title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss warning signs in the AI boom, including exploding token consumption costs, low utilization rates for shipped products, and valuation shifts. Topics include circular investment dynamics, Anthropic surpassing OpenAI in valuation, Robinhood's AI trading integration, and privacy and ethics concerns around AI service adoption.
